hero.kicker: Building full-stack products with cleaner structure and stronger frontend craft
hero.headline: Anushka Isuranga
hero.intro: I build software that feels professional in both code and presentation: clear interfaces, dependable flows, and product decisions that make sense to the people using them.

quickFacts.label: Location
quickFacts.detail: Open to SE roles & freelance work.

focusAreas.title: Frontend structure
focusAreas.text: Readable UI systems, cleaner spacing, and components that scale without feeling heavy.

focusAreas.title: Product delivery
focusAreas.text: Interfaces shaped around the actual workflow instead of just visual decoration.

focusAreas.title: Scalable Backend Systems
focusAreas.text: Building REST APIs with Spring Boot and ASP.NET, managing databases, and designing systems that grow without technical debt.

hero.bestFitText: Teams that want a portfolio-style frontend mindset backed by practical delivery, review discipline, and clear communication.

about.title: Full-Stack Systems and AI-Driven Solutions.
about.copy: Computer Science student with AI specialization focused on building full-stack applications and intelligent systems. I design scalable backend services, cloud-deployed platforms, and data-driven solutions. My work combines software engineering discipline with machine learning applications—from REST APIs and database architecture to predictive models and IoT systems. Currently contributing to production systems at Bitzify.

principles.title: Scalable Backend Systems
principles.text: Building robust REST APIs with Spring Boot and ASP.NET, designing databases that grow with the business, and implementing cloud-native architectures.

principles.title: AI & Machine Learning
principles.text: Integrating predictive models, data analysis, and intelligent decision-making into full-stack applications. Experience with Python, scikit-learn, and real-world ML deployment.

principles.title: Production-Ready Code
principles.text: Writing maintainable systems with proper testing, documentation, and CI/CD pipelines. Focus on engineering discipline and long-term maintainability.

highlightLabels.projects: featured builds across healthcare, operations, media, and IoT

capabilities: Building scalable REST APIs and backend services with Spring Boot, ASP.NET, and Node.js.
Designing database systems and data pipelines for production applications.
Developing machine learning models and integrating AI into full-stack systems.
Deploying cloud-based applications on AWS and Azure with containerization and CI/CD automation.
Creating full-stack applications that combine sophisticated backend logic with clean frontend architecture.
priorities: Building systems that are easy to maintain, scale, and extend with new ML features.
Writing well-documented APIs and data pipelines that other engineers can easily integrate with.
Deploying intelligent systems that combine backend reliability with predictive capabilities.

workingStyle.label: Working style
workingStyle.text: I like work that is grounded in actual delivery: role-aware systems, sensible data flows, and interfaces that help reviewers understand the project quickly instead of fighting the layout.

stackNote.label: Stack note
stackNote.text: The toolset lives in its own section so it reads more like a system view than a handful of loose tags.

stack.title: The tools I keep closest to the work.
stack.copy: Built like a dedicated section instead of loose badges: the core technologies, delivery tools, and product workflow essentials I return to most often.

sections.description: UI frameworks, styling, and browser-focused tooling
Data persistence, queries, and cloud storage
IDE, version control, testing, and design

experienceSection.title: A timeline that reads like real progress, not filler.
experienceSection.copy: My path combines education, leadership, and hands-on engineering work. The goal here is simple: make each step easy to scan, easy to understand, and clearly tied to what it added to the craft.

projectsSection.title: Case studies that explain the work without making you fight the layout.
projectsSection.copy: This section is now built to scan cleanly: project context first, delivery choices next, and outcome last. That makes the work easier to review whether the demo is public or the product is still private.

contact.title: Let us make the next build feel stronger from the start.
contact.copy: If you have a product idea, SE opportunity, collaboration, or a portfolio review request, I am happy to talk through it with clear expectations and a focused approach.
contact.bestFitText: SE roles, focused freelance work, and teams that value both code quality and presentation.

projects.title: Hostel Management System
projects.summary: Full-stack management system for handling tenant records, room allocation, and administrative operations with cloud deployment.
projects.challenge: Build a scalable system that manages multiple operational workflows while maintaining clean architecture and reliable deployments.
projects.delivery: Designed NestJS REST APIs with PostgreSQL, implemented Next.js frontend with TypeScript, containerized with Docker, and deployed on AWS EC2.
projects.impact: Demonstrated end-to-end full-stack delivery including automated CI/CD pipelines, comprehensive testing, and production-grade deployment.

projects.title: Duskwood Hospital Appointment System
projects.summary: A production-style appointment and patient record platform designed to reduce friction for patients, doctors, and administrators.
projects.challenge: Build a system that coordinates booking flows, record management, reminders, and reporting without overwhelming different user roles.
projects.delivery: Designed a role-aware experience with appointment scheduling, patient records, admin controls, and automated reminder workflows.
projects.impact: Turned a complex hospital workflow into a more reliable digital system with clearer operational visibility.

projects.title: IntMind AI Sobriety Coach
projects.summary: An AI-powered mobile app designed to support alcohol recovery by helping users track moods, cravings, and triggers while receiving personalized guidance.
projects.challenge: Create a system that provides consistent support between therapy sessions while keeping the experience simple, private, and engaging for users in recovery.
projects.delivery: Built a cross-platform mobile app using React Native (Expo) with backend services in FastAPI and Express.js, integrating AI conversation workflows using LangChain and AutoGen.
projects.impact: Demonstrates how AI companions can support behavioral change through daily tracking, contextual conversations, and personalized suggestions.

projects.title: Asteria Desk Hotel Booking System
projects.summary: A Laravel-based hotel booking platform built to learn MVC architecture, covering reservations, room inventory, staff access, and operational dashboards.
projects.challenge: Structure a real-world hotel management workflow with clear separation of concerns, role-based access, and maintainable data handling across bookings, rooms, and team accounts.
projects.delivery: Built the system with Laravel, Inertia.js, React, and TypeScript using an MVC pattern for authentication, CRUD workflows, dashboard reporting, and hotel operations management.
projects.impact: Demonstrated how a full-stack Laravel application can stay organized, scalable, and user-friendly while handling core hospitality operations in one place.

projects.title: Dilthira Stock Portal
projects.summary: A stock and transaction portal for a pepper co-op focused on clarity, reporting, and day-to-day inventory visibility.
projects.challenge: Create a straightforward administrative tool for stock, income, and transaction tracking using foundational web technologies.
projects.delivery: Built inventory, transaction, and user-management flows with reporting support for small-scale business operations.
projects.impact: Gave the co-op a more structured digital layer for stock accuracy and business reporting.

projects.title: Horizon News Mobile App
projects.summary: A newsroom-oriented mobile app where readers, editors, and reporters each get workflows tailored to their role.
projects.challenge: Balance article publishing, account management, editorial review, and drafting inside a mobile-first product.
projects.delivery: Created role-specific capabilities for reading, rating, managing content, and drafting reports across the news lifecycle.
projects.impact: Showed how editorial tools can feel structured and intuitive on mobile while still supporting complex permissions.

projects.title: EnviroSense Smog Tower System
projects.summary: An air-quality monitoring and purification concept combining IoT capture, forecasting, and environmental dashboards.
projects.challenge: Translate real-world environmental data into something measurable, forecastable, and useful for public monitoring.
projects.delivery: Connected sensing, forecasting, and cloud-based monitoring into a system that surfaces air-quality performance in real time.
projects.impact: Positioned environmental data as a decision-making tool rather than just a stream of raw measurements.
